---
title: "Class 19: Cancer Mutation Mini Project"
author: "Alfred Phyo (PID: A18129346)"
format: html
---

I downloaded my sequence from the class website and moved it to my working directory:


```{r}
library(bio3d)

a <- read.fasta("A18129346_mutant_seq.fa")
a
```

We could score residue conservation then find the non 1.0 scoring positions. These will be the mutation positions:

```{r}
which(conserv(a) < 1)
```

```{r}
paste(a$ali[1, mutation.sitess],
      mutation.sites,
      a$ali[2,]
```
